name: github-sync
description: Deep GitHub integration — webhook receiver for PRs, issues, CI status. Bidirectional sync between GitHub and Mycelium tasks/bugs.
author: SoftBacon Software

name: daily-digest
description: Auto-generates daily and weekly summaries of swarm activity — tasks completed, bugs fixed, plans advanced, agent utilization.
author: SoftBacon Software

name: guardrails
description: Automated quality checks and rule enforcement. Configurable rules that validate agent actions before they land — block or warn on violations.
author: SoftBacon Software

name: slack-bridge
description: Bidirectional Slack integration — forward agent activity to Slack, receive slash commands, sync channels.
author: SoftBacon Software

name: project-tracker-sync
description: Bidirectional task sync with Linear and Jira. Status mapping, comment sync, and conflict resolution.
author: SoftBacon Software

name: error-monitor
description: Receives error alerts from Sentry, Bugsnag, and Datadog. Auto-files Mycelium bugs with stack traces and deduplication.
author: SoftBacon Software

name: cost-tracker
description: Tracks AI API token usage and costs per agent, project, and task. Budget alerts and spend dashboards.
author: SoftBacon Software

name: workflow-automations
description: Event-driven automation rules — when X happens, do Y. Create tasks, assign agents, send messages, and more based on platform events.
author: SoftBacon Software

name: build-in-public
description: Watches agent events, drafts social content from milestones, routes to operator inbox for approval before posting.
author: SoftBacon Software

name: outreach
description: YouTube discovery, Claude personalization, and Gmail delivery for creator and customer outreach campaigns.
author: SoftBacon Software

name: social-posting
description: Publishes content to TikTok, Twitter (via Buffer), and Instagram (Graph API) with scheduling support.
author: SoftBacon Software

name: video-pipeline
description: Video generation workflow for showcase content and marketing materials.
author: SoftBacon Software

name: steam-assets
description: Steam store asset management and integration for game publishing workflows.
author: SoftBacon Software
